text: PLATFORM ENVIRONMENT CANVAS v2.0 Part of the Platform Innovation Kit - the toolset for the platform generation Download at www.platforminnovationkit.com TITLE DATE CREATED BYENVIRONMENTECOSYSTEM FORCES SCAN v5.0 Part of the Platform Innovation Kit - the toolset for the platform generation Download at www.platforminnovationkit.com Created by fastbreak.one TITLEENVIRON-MENT MACROECONOMIC Forces from global market conditions: § Capital markets § Economic infrastructure § Commodities and other resources ENVIRONMENT § Societal and cultural forces § Socialeconomic forces § Natural forces VALUE CHAIN Forces from other value chain actors Examples of stakeholders: § Competitors (Incumbents) § New entrants (Insurgents) § Substitute product & services ENG MARKET § Regulatory trends § Key technology trends § Market issues PIK
